claimBoundary: No non-human gate can philosophically prove AGI. This matrix verifies machine-checkable evidence required before any AGI-candidate or AGI-language claim is considered.

levels.level2: AGI-candidate architecture: core gates, harnesses, smoke checks, and proof artifacts exist.
levels.level3: Strong AGI-candidate evidence: hidden comparisons, self-extension, grounding, memory, coding, long-horizon short run, and distribution-shift evidence pass machine gates.
levels.level4: Expert-reviewable AGI evidence: external benchmarks, 2h/1d autonomy, replicated clean-clone evidence, and RLVR held-out adapter improvement pass machine gates.
levels.level5: Proven AGI: not machine-assertable by this repository; requires external scientific/social consensus beyond non-human checks.

methods.description: Sophia-full beats raw/tools/RAG/gate-only on hidden pack auto-scoring.
Self-extension loop closes on held-out/eval split.
Verifier-synthesis meta-verification admits only validated checks and abstains otherwise; the WITHOUT-meta ablation proves the validation step earns trust (non-circular self-extension).
Cross-entity generalization invariants hold: memorized rules do not transfer to unseen entities and grounding (not pattern memorization) is required for low-false-positive transfer.
Learning-under-shift improves fresh post-test without old-knowledge regression.
At least one substantive 30-minute autonomy run passes machine verification.
Live RLVR training artifact exists; not a capability claim.
Base-vs-adapter held-out eval passes without false-positive regression.
Sophia-full has external benchmark results, not just base-model harness results.
Substantive 2-hour and 1-day autonomy runs pass machine verification.
Clean-clone machine checklist passes; human identity/signature remains outside non-human verification.
